settings.question: WHAT IS MYCRANBI?
settings.answer: MyCranbi is a premium personal care brand focused on clean, effective, and sustainable skincare and haircare solutions.

settings.question: ARE YOUR PRODUCTS CRUELTY-FREE?
settings.answer: Yes! We absolutely love animals. None of our products or raw ingredients are ever tested on animals.

settings.question: WHERE ARE YOUR PRODUCTS MADE?
settings.answer: All our products are thoughtfully formulated and proudly manufactured locally with strict quality control.

settings.question: ARE YOUR PRODUCTS SUITABLE FOR SENSITIVE SKIN?
settings.answer: Yes, our formulations are designed to be extremely gentle, toxin-free, and effective for most skin and hair types, including sensitive profiles.

settings.question: DO YOU OFFER SAMPLES?
settings.answer: While we don't currently sell sample sizes, we occasionally include complimentary minis with larger orders!

settings.question: HOW CAN I CONTACT CUSTOMER SUPPORT?
settings.answer: You can reach out to us via the Contact page or directly email us at service@mycranbi.com.

settings.question: CAN I FIND MYCRANBI IN STORES?
settings.answer: Currently, we are exclusively direct-to-consumer online to ensure the best prices and freshest products for you.

settings.question: HOW LONG DOES SHIPPING TAKE?
settings.answer: Orders are typically processed within 1-2 business days. Delivery usually takes 3-5 business days depending on your location.

settings.question: DO YOU OFFER FREE SHIPPING?
settings.answer: Yes, we offer free shipping on all orders over ₹999.

settings.question: HOW CAN I TRACK MY ORDER?
settings.answer: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking link via email and SMS to follow its journey.

settings.question: WHAT IS YOUR RETURN POLICY?
settings.answer: We accept returns on unused, unopened products within 7 days of delivery. Please contact support to initiate a return.

settings.question: MY PRODUCT ARRIVED DAMAGED. WHAT DO I DO?
settings.answer: We apologize for the inconvenience! Please email us a photo of the damaged item within 48 hours, and we will send a replacement immediately.

settings.question: CAN I CANCEL OR CHANGE MY ORDER?
settings.answer: If your order hasn't shipped yet, we can usually accommodate changes or cancellations. Reach out to us ASAP!

settings.question: DO YOU SHIP INTERNATIONALLY?
settings.answer: Currently, we ship exclusively within India, but we hope to expand internationally soon!

settings.question: ARE YOUR PRODUCTS TOXIN-FREE?
settings.answer: Absolutely. We say no to parabens, sulfates, phthalates, and other harsh chemicals.

settings.question: WHAT DOES 'CLEAN & EFFECTIVE' MEAN?
settings.answer: It means we use safe, non-toxic ingredients (both natural and scientifically proven synthetic ones) that deliver visible results without harming your body.

settings.question: IS YOUR PACKAGING ECO-FRIENDLY?
settings.answer: Sustainability is at our core. We strive to use recyclable materials and minimize plastic across our entire product line.

settings.question: ARE YOUR FORMULAS VEGAN?
settings.answer: The majority of our products are 100% vegan. Please check individual product pages for specific ingredient lists.

settings.question: DO YOUR PRODUCTS HAVE ARTIFICIAL FRAGRANCES?
settings.answer: We use minimal, allergen-free fragrances or natural essential oils to create a pleasant experience without irritating sensitive skin.

settings.question: WHAT IS YOUR STAND ON PALM OIL?
settings.answer: We avoid palm oil wherever possible. If used, we strictly ensure it is RSPO-certified sustainable.

settings.question: HOW LONG DO YOUR PRODUCTS LAST AFTER OPENING?
settings.answer: Most of our products have a shelf life of 12-24 months unopened, and 6-12 months after opening. Look for the open-jar symbol on the packaging!
